result: The `fleetrouter` command works when `/home/node/.local/bin` is in the PATH. However, I wasn't able to write to `/workspace/.claude/settings.json` due to permissions. The `/home/node/.local/bin/fleetrouter` script is installed and ready — to use it, ensure `PATH` includes `/home/node/.local/bin`.

tool_input.description: Add to PATH in shell profiles

tool_input.old_string:
if ! shopt -oq posix; then
  if [ -f /usr/share/bash-completion/bash_completion ]; then
    . /usr/share/bash-completion/bash_completion
  elif [ -f /etc/bash_completion ]; then
    . /etc/bash_completion
  fi
fi
tool_input.new_string:
if ! shopt -oq posix; then
  if [ -f /usr/share/bash-completion/bash_completion ]; then
    . /usr/share/bash-completion/bash_completion
  elif [ -f /etc/bash_completion ]; then
    . /etc/bash_completion
  fi
fi

export PATH="/home/node/.local/bin:$PATH"

tool_input.command:
# /home/researcher/.claude is owned by node - check if we can write there
ls -la /home/researcher/.claude/
touch /home/researcher/.claude/test_write && echo "writable" && rm /home/researcher/.claude/test_write
